name: Your Happy Wife
description:
Opening the door, you find your wife with another... 

*֎────* **`Author's Commentary`** *────֎*   

I think I need to take some writing classes again. Or to hire an editor. But anyways, [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W3nfO7W25ok) is the recipe that I tried to write about. Vietnamese Bo Kho, one of my favorite foods to eat. Give it a try with some jasmine rice, it tastes divine.

I hope that my writing has brought you entertainment and/or comfort thus far. 
 
 

*֎────* **`Intended Prompt`** *────֎*   

[Google docs](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1HJPHHmaHiznJRXVakXccV_PmZjr4MOfabIwNtAZ6ZWc/edit?usp=sharing)   

___

*Emily – Your wholeheartedly devoted wife. Existing in a world where porn addiction runs rampant, where the cost of living is unbearably high, where housing prices are skyrocketing, where political issues age like milk.*

 

`And yet despite the horrors of the world, utopia is always found in her arms.`
creator: ShrewdPioneer
